prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: runtime tactics unit sprite candidate
Primary request: create a new Time Travelers unit called Time Lord, an extremely powerful and extremely fast chrono master with an original silhouette inspired by an arrogant time-traveling renegade, but not based on any existing copyrighted character
Subject: a lean male-presenting time-bending elite from the Time Travelers faction, wearing a long tailored coat over light reactive armor, dressed more lightly and arrogantly than the faction's troopers because he relies on speed and temporal power instead of bulk; he should feel dangerous, brilliant, and untouchable
Style/medium: painterly pixel-art-inspired 2D tactics sprite matching the approved Time Travelers runtime units, with moderate pixelation, readable large shapes, and clean silhouette design that survives downscaling well around 104 to 110 px tall in game
Composition/framing: single full-body subject, centered, slightly relaxed but confident stance, transparent background, tight sprite bounds; one hand may gesture with calm superiority while the other controls or carries a compact chrono device or slim sidearm; the long coat must be the main silhouette feature
Lighting/mood: cold reactor light with restrained contrast, moody but readable, subtle temporal-tech glow rather than magical fantasy glow
Color palette: match the Time Travelers faction language with weathered steel, oxidized teal, faded hazard orange, cold reactor white, and dark underlayers; lighter and cleaner than the bulky trooper, but still unmistakably from the same faction
Materials/textures: segmented light armor plates, chrono instrumentation, tailored coat fabric, compact utility straps, worn field-tech details
Constraints: original character design only; no resemblance to specific copyrighted sci-fi protagonists; must read as a Time Travelers faction unit, just higher status, faster, and more arrogant; keep the subject slim, mobile, and coat-driven rather than heavily armored; exactly one subject; no floor; no scenery; no text; no extra subjects; alpha only outside the outer silhouette; avoid oversized transparent padding
Avoid: trenchcoat detective cliché, fantasy wizard robe, heavy power armor, cape, anime hero styling, steampunk goggles overload, glossy rendering, photorealism, noisy micro-detail, cinematic background
